name: Kindred Edict
reqs: kindred_edict := 30r STR OR 30r FTD OR 30r AGL, 50r MED
desc: A blade forged from pale metal recovered from Celestial crash-sites by Starkindred artisans. Nearly weightless, this type of blade is a staple in the West amongst adherents of the faith. Once one has spilt enough of their own blood in service of the Church, they are bestowed a weapon thrice-bathed in the sacred ichor of a Celestial.
